PENDING-title: Your order currently waits for approval!
DESIGN-title: Your order is currently in the design phase!
PRINT_READY-title: Your order is currently in the preparation phase!
PRINTING-title: Your order is currently in the printing phase!
SEWING-title: Your order is currently in the sewing phase!
SHIP_READY-title: Your order is currently in the shipment preparation phase!
SHIPPED-title: Your order has just been shipped!
DESIGN-disclaimer:
A unique design is currently being created for your order.
This process can take up to 3 days. The status will be
automatically updated once the next step begins.
PENDING-disclaimer: Za vašu porudžbinu se trenutno proverava validnost dostavljenih podataka i dodaju neophodne informacije kako bi porudžbina bila kompletna. Nakon odobrenja porudžbine, ona postaje spremna za štampu. Ovaj proces obično traje 1 dan.
PRINT_READY-disclaimer:
Files for your order are currently being prepared and sent
for printing. This process can take up to 2 days.
The status will be automatically updated once the next step begins.
PRINTING-disclaimer:
One step closer! Your order is currently being printed.
This process can take up to 2 days. The status will be
automatically updated once the next step begins.
SEWING-disclaimer:
Our diligent tailors are working hard to ensure your equipment
is perfect! This process can take up to 3 days. The status
will be automatically updated once the next step begins.
SHIP_READY-disclaimer:
Almost there! Your order is currently being prepared for shipping.
This process can take up to 1 day. The status will be
automatically updated once the next step begins.
SHIPPED-disclaimer:
Finally! Your order has been shipped, and you can expect
contact from the courier soon. This process can take up to
1 day. The status will be automatically updated once the next step begins.
DONE-disclaimer:
Finally in your hands! We made every effort to deliver
your order as quickly as possible. We hope you are satisfied
and look forward to hearing your feedback!
